'''Protas''' was the younger brother of [[Elis]]. He was one of the miners on [[Anobis]] that sided with the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] to ensure good trade with the Empire, he survived until the end of the Civil war on Anobis. He was convinced by [[Anja Gallandro]] to go to [[Yuos]]'s village so they could sabotage it. Unfortunately for him, when him Anja and other miners were planting explosives, Anja did not inform him of were she placed the detonators, so when he went over to plant a [[burrowing detonator]] at the doorstep of Yuos's house, he fell victim of Anjas's own explosive which she placed there only minutes before. The explosion killed him.

==Appearances==
*''[[Young Jedi Knights: Return to Ord Mantell]]'' {{1st}}
